comments: This veDEX model sounds refreshing! Finally a launch that actually puts the community first without all the usual preferential treatment.
The flywheel mechanism looks really well thought out - love how it creates incentives that benefit everyone involved rather than just early insiders.
Great to see a truly fair launch approach on MegaETH. The veDEX concept could really set a new standard for decentralized exchanges.
content:
Most DEX launches feel like the same old story. Presales. VCs. Early insiders. MarbMarket is doing something different. No presale. No VCs. Just a fair launch on MegaETH.

veDEX isn't just another buzzword. It's a model where your MARB locks give you real voting power. Longer locks mean more influence over where rewards flow. Projects can bribe for votes, creating a system that benefits everyone.

The MARB flywheel works like this: Lockers direct emissions, LPs earn rewards, protocols pay for votes, and incentives flow back to lockers. It's a self-sustaining cycle that actually benefits the community.

Fair launch means no one gets special treatment. Everyone starts at the same time. That's real decentralization. @RallyOnChain

Check out x.com/Marb_market to learn more. How many veDEX launches have you seen that actually put community first?
